meaning: n.上升,增加,上涨,高地,小山,发生,出现vi.升起,起身,发源,起义,高耸,增长,上升,复活vt.使飞起
examples: I'm going to ask for a rise.
Within two months Kelly got a rise.
When water levels rise, flooding results.
The pay rise attracted criticism from various consumer groups, including the National Campaign for Water Justice.
The pros also think the U.S. dollar and commodities will both rise sharply in 2010.
